def test_graphql_query_with_name():
        app_id = get_app_id()
        url = f"https://staging-{app_id}.encr.app/graphql"
    
        payload = {
            "query": "query { hello(name: \"Alice\") }"
        }
        response = requests.post(url, json=payload)
